name: Ham Balls
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1 1/2 cups Brown sugar
1 teaspoon Dry mustard
1/2 cup White vinegar
1/2 cup Water
Mix the ham, crushed white crackers, eggs, pepper, and milk thoroughly. Form into balls.
Place the balls in a 9 x 13 pan.
In a saucepan, mix the brown sugar, dry mustard, white vinegar, and water. Heat together until combined.
Pour the sauce over the balls.
Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours, uncovered. Optionally add one can of pineapple chunks before cooking.
